nexus-one.title: Nexus One
nexus-one.description: The unified Nexus element for swap, send, and deposit flows. One component for all cross-chain operations powered by Nexus intents.
nexus-one.docs: Nexus One is the single recommended component for all cross-chain flows. Supports config.mode = "swap" | "send" | "deposit".

fast-bridge.title: Fast Bridge
fast-bridge.description: Deprecated: use Nexus One instead. A legacy component built with Nexus to enable cross chain bridging.
fast-bridge.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one for new integrations.

meta.deprecationMessage: Fast Bridge is deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one for new integrations.

transfer.title: Fast Transfer
transfer.description: Deprecated: use Nexus One instead. A legacy component built with Nexus to enable cross chain transfer.
transfer.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one with config.mode = "send" for new integrations.

meta.deprecationMessage: Fast Transfer is deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one with config.mode = "send" for new integrations.

nexus.name: nexus-provider
nexus.title: Nexus Provider
nexus.description: Shared Nexus SDK provider and types for Nexus Elements

deposit.title: Deposit
deposit.description: Deprecated: use Nexus One instead. A legacy component built with Nexus to enable deposits.
deposit.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one with config.mode = "deposit" and a deposit config for new integrations.

meta.deprecationMessage: Deposit is deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one with config.mode = "deposit" and a deposit config for new integrations.

swaps.title: Swaps
swaps.description: Legacy swap tokens across chains component.
swaps.docs: Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one with config.mode = "swap" for new integrations.

unified-balance.title: Unified Balance
unified-balance.description: Deprecated: use Nexus One instead. Unified Balance has been removed in favor of Nexus One's inline balance views.
unified-balance.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Nexus One includes inline balance views during swap, send, and deposit flows.

meta.deprecationMessage: Unified Balance is deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one for new integrations.

view-history.title: View History
view-history.description: Deprecated: use Nexus One instead. View History has been removed. Use sdk.getMyIntents() for programmatic access.
view-history.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Intent history is not included in Nexus One V1. Use sdk.getMyIntents() directly.

meta.deprecationMessage: View History is deprecated. Use sdk.getMyIntents() for programmatic intent history access.

bridge-deposit.title: Bridge Deposit
bridge-deposit.description: Deprecated: use Nexus One instead. Bridge Deposit has been removed in favor of Nexus One deposit mode.
bridge-deposit.docs: Deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one with config.mode = "deposit" and a deposit config for new integrations.

meta.deprecationMessage: Bridge Deposit is deprecated in favor of Nexus One. Use @nexus-elements/nexus-one with config.mode = "deposit" and a deposit config for new integrations.

all.title: All Elements
all.description: Install all Nexus Elements. For new integrations, use @nexus-elements/nexus-one instead — it provides unified swap, send, and deposit in one component.

utils.title: Utils (cn)
utils.description: Utility helpers used by UI components
